ConsultationRequest.title: Consultation Request
ConsultationRequest.description: A request for a free consultation from a clinic owner.

name.description: Full name of the contact person.

email.description: Email address of the contact person.

phone.description: Phone number of the contact person.

message.description: The message or challenge described by the owner.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was submitted.

/consultation_requests/{requestId}.description: Collection of consultation requests submitted via the contact form.
